_note: Curated 'on the radar' signals for the home page — real, dated, public-sourced events, hand-maintained like the regulatory corpus. NOT a live news scrape (deliberately — keeps the credibility spine: every line is sourced + dated). Refresh by editing this file. Keep it to 3, spanning a threat, a growth signal and an operational one.

signals.title: EU tobacco-tax revision reaches the cigar & pipe core
signals.why: Would raise excise minimums on cigars, cigarillos and pipe from 2028 — STG's combustible core (~85% of group net sales). The EU cigar/pipe base is the exposed slice; this is the one to put a kroner number on.

signals.title: XQS keeps taking pouch share from Zyn and Velo
signals.why: XQS reached 13.6% share in Sweden (from 7.8% in 2024) — STG's clearest growth leg, in a category now squarely under regulatory pressure.

signals.title: STG's Central Java leaf sits in 'extremely high' water stress
signals.why: The Semarang leaf region rates Extremely High baseline water stress (>80% of supply withdrawn) — a quiet sourcing risk on the handmade supply chain, on top of live ENSO climate swings.
